comments: “The whole of the two hour programme will be dedicated to just one event…”
This is the Status Quo 20th Anniversary show at the NEC in the presence of Charlie boy.

Sound quality is pretty good, with one dropout in Caroline, a sense that the tape speeds up in Rain, and a slight hiss throughout. Otherwise this is a must for Quo fans as it retains their version of the National Anthem and all the between song chat which were missing from the official Live at the BBC box set.
